evidence: Task-status counts are checked against task metadata, the validation manifest, and the main/concise report top lines.
required_action: Regenerate task metadata, validation manifest, concise report, and main report after any task-status change.

evidence: Requirement status counts are checked where the report summarizes supported/partial/not_met evidence.
required_action: Regenerate requirement coverage and all report layers after requirement status changes.

evidence: Claim-authorization status counts are checked against generated report summaries.
required_action: Regenerate claim authorization, concise report, and main report after claim status changes.

evidence: Release-decision and freeze-readiness status counts are checked wherever the report repeats them.
required_action: Regenerate release/freeze reports and all report layers after gate-status changes.

evidence: Model-sweep coverage counts are checked against the source summary and report wording that keeps performance claims blocked.
required_action: Regenerate model-result analysis and reports after provider rows or sweep plans change.

evidence: Run-result counts are checked against the validation manifest and the appendix manifest summary.
required_action: Regenerate local QA rows, validation manifest, and report appendix after run-result changes.

evidence: Locked-benchmark blocker identifiers are checked against requirement coverage, the claim-gap row, and report blocker tables.
required_action: Regenerate requirement coverage, claim gap matrix, and reports when locked-benchmark blockers change.

evidence: Public-export task and hidden/wrong-path counts are checked against the manifest and appendix summary.
required_action: Regenerate public export, validation manifest, and report appendix after public task export changes.
